message:
test(id): update generate_id_seed test assertions for length-prefixed encoding

Followup to the seed length-prefix fix: `test_generate_id_seed` still
expected the old bare-delimiter shape ("title", "desc", "me",
ends_with "|0"). The new encoding is
`<len>:<value>` per field, so the assertions needed to reflect that:

- "title" (5 bytes) → `5:title`
- "desc"  (4 bytes) → `4:desc`
- "me"    (2 bytes) → `2:me`
- nonce "0" (1 byte, final part) → seed ends with `1:0`

Pure test adjustment; the encoding itself already shipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
